---
title: Teaching
excertp: "A list of courses I have lectured"
toc-location: right
page-layout: full
---

\## 2023

-   Data science in context. Winter semester. TU Dortmund.

-   Intensive course in Statistics. Summer semester. TU Dortmund.

\## 2022

-   Bayesian Statistics and Probabilistic Machine Learning. Summer semester. University of Stuttgart.

\## 2020
